channel.title: Just In
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026, Australian Broadcasting Corporation. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Sunwater chair labels costly dam rebuild 'grossly disproportionate'
item.description: In a letter addressed to the water minister, Sunwater chair Jeff Seeney said the decision to rebuild the dam lacked "any rigour" or "professional credibility".
item.dc:creator: Stephen Clarke and Emma Johnson

media:group.media:description: Sunwater chair Jeff Seeney has written to the Queensland government recommending against rebuilding the troubled Paradise Dam.

item.title: Victims allegedly raped, cut by scissors in unrelated DV incidents on same day
item.description: NT Police have charged a 41-year-old man with rape after his "appalling behaviour" inside a hotel room, which authorities allege was one of two domestic violence incidents to occur in Darwin's CBD in the same day.
item.dc:creator: Gemma Ferguson

media:group.media:description: Police in Darwin responded to the domestic violence, which were unrelated but both occurred in the city centre on the same day.

item.title: Person dies after being hit by plane in the US
item.description: A person who jumped a fence at a US airport has been killed after being struck by a plane during take-off.

media:group.media:description: A plane was evacuated after a person was struck and killed at Denver International Airport.

item.title: Live: Storm score four tries in opening 13 minutes to stun Tigers
item.description: The Melbourne Storm is on a seven-match losing streak, the club's worst run since entering the NRL, and hosts Wests Tigers. Follow live.
item.dc:creator: Michael Doyle

media:group.media:description: Sualauvi Faalogo scored the first of four first-half tries for the Storm in their impressive display against Wests Tigers.

item.title: Passengers on Antarctic cruise struck by hantavirus to undergo medical screening
item.description: The Centers for Disease Control is now involved in managing the outbreak of hantavirus aboard the MV Hondius, which is set to arrive this afternoon in the Canary Islands.
item.dc:creator: Fergus Gregg

media:group.media:description: A drone view of the cruise ship MV Hondius leaving Cape Verde.

item.title: Live: Eagles lose key defender to concussion against Demons
item.description: Melbourne makes a strong start against West Coast at Docklands, as the Eagles lose Harry Edwards to concussion. Later, the Tigers and the Crows close out round nine. Follow live.
item.dc:creator: Luke Pentony

media:group.media:description: Harry Edwards returned to the West Coast side after concussion, only to come off under the blood rule against Melbourne at Docklands.

item.title: Missing scientists may represent a 'grave threat to US national security'
item.description: The scientists supposedly all had access to sensitive government research, and the nature of their work has led to speculation that their cases might all be connected.
item.dc:creator: Lewis Wiseman

media:group.media:description: Some of the scientists worked for NASA.

item.title: Climbers winched to safety after overnight ordeal in the Warrumbungles
item.description: A falling rock sparks a tense rescue in the Warrumbungle National Park in central-western New South Wales.
item.dc:creator: Jen McCutcheon

media:group.media:description: The climbers were rescued from a bluff in Warrumbungle National Park.

item.title: Why this ex-Liberal thinks she can unite One Nation and Greens voters
item.description: Charlotte Mortlock believes it is time for Australia to leave the left-right ideology behind and focus on what brings people together instead.
item.dc:creator: David Marchese

media:group.media:description: Former journalist and Liberal staffer Charlotte Mortlock is starting her own political movement

item.title: Family channels grief into thousands of dollars for Leukaemia Foundation
item.description: Elli Wust was pregnant with her first child when she found out her mum had a rare blood cancer. Now she has two children who never got to meet their grandmother, who died at age 58.
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Jarrett

media:group.media:description: Grandaughter Summer Collins and sisters Elli Wust and Jodie Collins honour Christine Gray in an annual Mother's Day event every year, raising money for the Leukaemia Foundation.

item.title: Love story: Love when you don't know how long you've got
item.description: My 14-year-old daughter Pip has Williams syndrome. The future is uncertain and full of heartache, but my love for my baby is not.

media:group.media:description: Kerrie Franc is mum and carer to daughter Pippa, who has Williams syndrome.

item.title: Police questioning fail-to-stop driver after 92yo killed in crash
item.description: A car rolled and smashed into a power pole, killing its elderly passenger, after swerving to avoid a car driving the wrong way on the New England Highway in southern Queensland.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dye

media:group.media:description: Another life has been lost on Queensland's roads after an elderly man was killed near the NSW border.

item.title: Yaraka publican shares why she's selling the town's only pub
item.description: A year after her husband died in a car crash, Gerry Gimblett says it is time to sell the pub they ran for more than a decade.
item.dc:creator: Crispian Yeomans

media:group.media:description: Gerry Gimblett says it has been a privilege to serve behind the bar at the Yaraka Hotel.

item.title: Fans left 'uncomfortable' as referee criticised in bloody heavyweight brawl
item.description: Daniel Dubois stops Fabio Wardley in the 11th round of a brutal contest to take the WBO heavyweight title as observers ringside criticise an "uncomfortable watch".

media:group.media:description: Daniel Dubois is now a two-time world heavyweight champion.

item.title: Alexa Leary misses out on Commonwealth Games after reclassification
item.description: Alexa Leary is classified out of the Commonwealth Games team as Swimming Australia names first half of squad for Glasgow 2026.
item.dc:creator: Simon Smale

media:group.media:description: Alexa Leary will miss out on a spot at the Commonwealth Games.

item.title: Home destroyed by fire rebuilt with tyres, bottles and cans
item.description: Dee-Ann Kelly lost her home to fire in 2024, now she's rebuilding an Earthship, made from recycled materials in an effort to make her home more fire resilient.
item.dc:creator: Eden Hynninen and Jane Nield

media:group.media:description: An Earthship is made from recycled materials such as bottles, tyres and cans.

item.title: Pauline Hanson lashes 'arrogant' critics who say One Nation can't go mainstream
item.description: Pauline Hanson says the major parties "will lose" because of an "arrogant" belief that One Nation is not able to become a mainstream force, following the party's first lower house win this century.
item.dc:creator: Jake Evans

media:group.media:description: Pauline Hanson says her party is here for the long haul.

item.title: 'A terrible waste': Prison unit barely used amid overcrowding crisis
item.description: The notorious Unit 18, a makeshift youth detention facility within the adult Casuarina Prison, has sat empty for at least a week while other WA prisons are bursting at the seams.
item.dc:creator: Keane Bourke

media:group.media:description: WA's maximum-security prisons are overcrowded.

item.title: From buckin' bulls to boxing: Aussie champ's new challenge
item.description: In his 50s, retired bull rider Troy Dunn has taken up boxing because it's "easier" on his body.
item.dc:creator: Liam McNally

media:group.media:description: Dunn spends his days working on his Wagyu cattle property in Bloomsbury, guiding the next generation of bull riders, and boxing.

item.title: Chalmers reveals gas tax revenue is up in federal budget
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers says the tax on offshore gas projects has raised more revenue than expected this year, as he prepares to hand down a budget focused on fixing a "broken" housing market and tax system.
item.dc:creator: Jane Norman

media:group.media:description: Jim Chalmers will deliver the federal budget on Tuesday.

item.title: Students chasing hydrogen racing world title in Switzerland
item.description: A group of Whyalla high school students is heading to Switzerland to race a remote-control hydrogen-powered car that they designed and engineered.
item.dc:creator: Arj Ganesan

media:group.media:description: Five students from Whyalla have earned a start in an international hydrogen-powered model car race.

item.title: Iran fears captain may be denied entry to US for World Cup
item.description: Iran demands assurances that team members who served in the Revolutionary Guard, including skipper Mehdi Taremi, will be able to get visas for the FIFA World Cup.

media:group.media:description: Mehdi Taremi is captain of the Iranian national team.

item.title: 'My career wasn't the same': Why Kira Puru stopped releasing songs
item.description: Kira Puru is known for their triple j Hottest 100-charting energetic pop music, but this year the musician has roles in not one, but two of the biggest Australian TV shows. What's behind the pivot?
item.dc:creator: Yasmin Jeffery

media:group.media:description: Kira Puru.

item.title: Live: Iran's IRGC threatens US sites as Trump awaits Tehran response
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has threatened to target US sites if its tankers come under fire, Iranian media is reporting. It comes as Washington continues to wait for Tehran's response to its latest negotiating position. Follow live.

media:group.media:description: Iranian missiles are displayed at the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps(IRGC) Aerospace Force Museum in Tehran, Iran, November 12, 2025. (Majid Asgaripour/WANA via Reuters)

item.title: When the post office threatened to shut, locals found an unusual solution
item.description: A train carriage that has been transformed into a Wheatbelt post office is bringing a small community together.
item.dc:creator: Eliza Bidstrup

media:group.media:description: Volunteers brought the carriage post office to life within a month of the town's general store closing.
